title: A Korean AI model scores every possible driving path for safety before the car moves. CVPR called it a highlight.
summary: Seoul National University’s SafeDrive model scores multiple driving paths for safety before choosing one. First Korean end-to-end autonomous driving paper to earn a CVPR highlight.
